metadata.title: AGM Core Tech — Enterprise Software Engineering
metadata.description: AGM Core Tech architects scalable software systems, business platforms, and integration infrastructure for enterprise teams.

hero.title: Engineered for Scale.
hero.subtitle: We architect scalable software systems, business platforms, and integration infrastructure — not marketing services.

architecture.title: Scalable backend & cloud infrastructure
architecture.alt: Dark server racks with cyan accent lighting in an enterprise data center

integrations.title: API layers & connected data fabric
integrations.alt: Abstract glowing network nodes connected by cyan and purple light lines

platforms.title: Enterprise operations & analytics
platforms.alt: Curved monitor displaying a dark enterprise analytics dashboard with subtle UI glow

reference.title: Maison No.1 — luxury e-commerce platform
reference.alt: Minimal luxury product display with purple and cyan rim lighting

philosophy.quote: We don't build temporary fixes — we engineer sustainable architectures that adapt to your business growth pace. We meet your needs with the right technology and deliver uninterrupted, high-performance digital infrastructure.

founder.name: Atilla Görkem Meriç
founder.role: Founder & Chief Engineer, AGM Core Tech

precision.title: True Needs Analysis
precision.description: Instead of quick-fix features, we focus on strategic development that grows your business. We X-ray your operations and deliver pinpoint solutions for your real needs.

resilience.title: Sustainable Architecture
resilience.description: Not patched-up code — we build stable infrastructure that adapts to your growing volume for years. Every component is designed to optimize resource usage and server costs.

evolution.title: Uninterrupted Trust
evolution.description: We deliver every system we build to the highest security and business continuity standards. We don't leave your technology to chance — we ensure your digital assets run 24/7 without interruption.

about.title: Growth Journey
about.subtitle: Technological expansion — from the stability of the first line of code to the flexible AGM Core Tech infrastructure that carries your business into the future.
about.vision: Our vision is to solve complex infrastructure problems with raw engineering strength, giving businesses uninterrupted performance, security, and a sustainable foundation for growth in the digital world.

step1.label: Stage 01
step1.title: Discovery & Needs Analysis
step1.description: We map your current operations, bottlenecks, and growth goals. Instead of quick fixes, we define a strategic roadmap aligned with your real needs.

step2.label: Stage 02
step2.title: Architecture Design
step2.description: We design sustainable, scalable infrastructure that optimizes costs. Every component's role and long-term fit in the system is clarified.

step3.label: Stage 03
step3.title: Development & Integration
step3.description: We build and connect applications, APIs, and third-party systems with the right technology stack. Stability and performance are priorities from the first line of code.

step4.label: Stage 04
step4.title: Security & Performance Testing
step4.description: We bring the system to production standards through security, load, and business continuity checks. Uninterrupted operation and high performance targets are validated.

step5.label: Stage 05
step5.title: Launch & Continuous Evolution
step5.description: After go-live, monitoring, optimization, and iterative development adapt your digital infrastructure to growing volume and carry it into the future.

services.title: Enterprise Capabilities
services.subtitle: Three focused disciplines — core engineering, business systems, and technology consulting. Select a capability to explore.

customSoftware.title: Custom Software Development
customSoftware.description: Purpose-built applications engineered from first principles — web, desktop, and internal tools. Full lifecycle delivery from architecture through production operations.

scalableBackend.title: Scalable Backend Architectures
scalableBackend.description: High-throughput backend systems designed for growth — microservices, event-driven pipelines, and cost-efficient infrastructure that scales with demand.

apiIntegrations.title: API Development & System Integrations
apiIntegrations.description: Robust API layers and integration bridges connecting ERP, CRM, marketplaces, and third-party services into a unified, reliable data fabric.

databaseOptimization.title: Database & Performance Optimization
databaseOptimization.description: Deep performance engineering for data-intensive systems — query tuning, indexing strategy, replication, and observability for mission-critical workloads.

erpInventorySystems.title: ERP / Inventory Management Systems
erpInventorySystems.description: Centralized inventory, procurement, and order orchestration platforms — real-time stock visibility across warehouses, channels, and fulfillment partners.

marketplacePlatforms.title: Marketplace & Data Integration Platforms
marketplacePlatforms.description: Multi-channel commerce infrastructure — automated listing, pricing, stock sync, and order routing across global and regional marketplaces.

workflowAutomation.title: Workflow Automation Systems
workflowAutomation.description: BPM-style process automation — business rules, approval chains, task routing, and operational dashboards that eliminate manual handoffs.

enterpriseTechConsulting.title: Enterprise Technology Consulting
enterpriseTechConsulting.description: Architecture assessments, technology stack evaluation, and engineering leadership for teams navigating complex infrastructure decisions.

digitalTransformationConsulting.title: Digital Transformation Consulting
digitalTransformationConsulting.description: End-to-end transformation roadmaps — legacy modernization, platform strategy, team structure, and phased execution for enterprise-scale change.

coreEngineering.label: Core Software Engineering
coreEngineering.description: Foundational systems built for performance, scale, and long-term maintainability.

businessSystems.label: Business Systems & Platforms
businessSystems.description: Operational platforms that unify data, workflows, and enterprise processes.

technologyConsulting.label: Technology Consulting
technologyConsulting.description: Strategic guidance for architecture decisions and digital transformation.

pricing.subtitle: Browse by discipline and service — monthly retainer or project-based engagement with launch pricing for early partners.
pricing.launchNote: We're a new studio — all packages are 20% off for early partners.
pricing.retainerOnlyNote: This service is offered on a monthly retainer only — no project-based pricing.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Learn how AGM Core Tech collects, uses, and protects personal data submitted through our website and contact forms.
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how AGM Core Tech (“we”, “us”) handles information when you visit our website or contact us about our services.

data.title: Information we collect
data.body: We may collect information you voluntarily provide through contact forms, such as your name, email address, company name, project details, budget range, and timeline preferences. We also collect standard technical data including browser type, device information, and anonymized usage metrics through server logs.

use.title: How we use your information
use.body: We use submitted information to respond to inquiries, prepare proposals, deliver contracted services, and improve our website experience. We do not sell personal data to third parties.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may request access, correction, deletion, or restriction of your personal data. Contact us at info@agmcoretech.com to exercise these rights.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For privacy-related questions, email info@agmcoretech.com or write to AGM Core Tech, Istanbul, Turkey.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Terms governing use of the AGM Core Tech website and engagement with our software engineering and consulting services.
terms.intro: By accessing this website or submitting a project inquiry, you agree to the following terms.

data.title: Website use
data.body: You may browse this website for lawful purposes only. Content, branding, and materials are owned by AGM Core Tech unless otherwise stated and may not be copied without permission.

use.title: Services and proposals
use.body: Pricing shown on this website is indicative. Final scope, deliverables, and fees are defined in a written agreement before work begins. We reserve the right to update service descriptions and pricing.

rights.title: Limitation of liability
rights.body: This website is provided on an “as is” basis. To the fullest extent permitted by law, AGM Core Tech is not liable for indirect damages arising from use of the website or reliance on general information published here.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Questions about these terms can be sent to info@agmcoretech.com.
